workflow.name: Score and route BANT-qualified leads using Gemini, Gmail, Google Sheets and Telegram
workflow.description:
## [built by Gurey AI](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/contact)

# Qualify and route leads automatically with BANT scoring and Gmail

following up on every lead by hand is slow, inconsistent, and lets good opportunities slip. by the time you read a form submission, write a reply, and figure out what to do next — the lead has moved on.

---

## what this does

a contact form triggers the workflow. lead data is logged to Google Sheets, scored by Gemini 2.5 Flash using the BANT framework, then routed through a Switch node: hot leads get an immediate email + Telegram alert, mid leads get a softer email + alert, cold leads get a resource email + alert.

---

## who is it for

solo operators and small sales teams who want to stop qualifying leads manually.

---

Abdullahi Osman — AI Automation Engineer | [Gurey AI](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/) — reach me at gureyai2006@gmail.com

---

## what's inside

* Form Trigger — collects lead data
* Google Sheets — logs every submission
* Gemini 2.5 Flash — scores lead as hot, mid, or cold
* Switch — routes to the right path
* Gmail (×3) — sends a tailored email per score
* Telegram (×3) — notifies you for every lead

---

## APIs used

* Google Gemini — BANT lead scoring
* Gmail — automated follow-up emails
* Google Sheets — lead logging
* Telegram — team notifications

---

## estimated cost per run

varies — check [Google Gemini pricing](https://ai.google.dev/pricing). Gmail, Sheets, and Telegram are free within standard limits.

---

## [Created by Gurey AI](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/contact)
### other workflows i've built

---

### Need Help?
Email me with your questions [my email](mailto:gureyai2006@gmail.com) or ask in the [Forum](https://community.n8n.io/)!
Happy Hacking!

---

parameters.content:
### Cold Leads: Email Nurturing

This path provides value to leads who aren't ready to buy yet.

## Automated Lead Qualification & Follow-up

This workflow intelligently qualifies incoming leads using the BANT framework (Budget, Authority, Need, Timing) and automatically routes them to the most appropriate follow-up action:

*   **Hot Leads:** Redirected to a calendar booking link.
*   **Mid Leads:** Prompted to start a pre-filled WhatsApp chat.
*   **Cold Leads:** Sent a nurturing email with helpful resources.

### To get started:
1.  **Connect Google Gemini** (see red sticky note below).
2.  **Connect Gmail**.
3.  **Customize the `Score Lead` prompt** with your specific BANT criteria.
4.  **Set your Telegram** in the `Telegram` node.
5.  **Activate the `Lead Contact Form`** and submit a test application.


---

### Automate your operations today
Your time is valuable. Let us automate the boring stuff for you.

**👇 CHOOSE YOUR PATH:**

[ **I WANT TO EMAIL YOU** ](https://direct-mail-gateway.lovable.app)
> *We've put our heart into this business evaluation machine.*

[ **💡 I HAVE A SPECIFIC REQUEST** ](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/contact)

*wish you the best*

This is the brain of your lead qualification!

Open this node and adapt the `BANT Criteria Mapping` and `Scoring Logic` in the prompt to **your specific sales process and ideal customer profile**.
This `Switch` node acts as your lead router, directing leads down different paths based on the `hot`, `mid`, or `cold` score provided by the AI.

### Hot Leads: Calendar Booking

This path is for your most qualified leads.

### Mid Leads: WhatsApp Follow-up

This path engages moderately qualified leads via WhatsApp.

---

## Was this helpful? Let me know!

I really hope this template helped you. Your feedback is what helps me create better resources for the n8n community.

## who made this workflow

Abdullahi Osman — AI Automation Engineer | [Gurey AI](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/) — reach me at gureyai2006@gmail.com

Building AI automation for a year — built 50+ AI systems

### [**Contact me**](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/contact)


### **Have Feedback, a Question, or a Project Idea?**


#### ➡️ **[Click here to go to the Contact Form](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/contact)**

---

## [Created by Gurey AI](https://gurey-ai.vercel.app)

values.content:
=<role>
You are a Lead Scoring Expert specializing in the BANT (Budget, Authority, Need, Timing) qualification framework. Your analysis is critical for an automated sales workflow. You must follow all instructions precisely and only output the final JSON object.
</role>

<instructions>
<goal>
Analyze the responses from a lead capture form and return a single score: 'hot', 'mid', or 'cold'. This score will determine the next step in the sales process (e.g., sending a calendar link, starting a chat, or sending a follow-up email).
</goal>

<context>
You will be given four pieces of information from a lead, corresponding to the BANT framework.

**BANT Criteria Mapping:**
- **Budget:** The answer to "what's your budget".
- **Authority:** The answer to "what's your current position / job ?".
- **Need:** The answer to "what do you want to build in n8n ?".
- **Timing:** The answer to "when do you want to start ?".

**Scoring Logic:**
You must first evaluate each of the four BANT components individually as 'hot', 'mid', or 'cold' based on the following criteria:

- **Budget:**
    - **Hot:** Specific, significant budget mentioned (e.g., >$10k-50k, 'we have a budget allocated', 'funded project').
    - **Mid:** Vague but positive budget (e.g., '$5k-$10k', 'flexible', 'depends on scope').
    - **Cold:** No budget, very low budget, or just exploring (e.g., $1k-5k, 'no budget', 'I'm a student', 'just looking', 'undecided').

- **Authority:**
    - **Hot:** Clear decision-maker or C-level role (e.g., CEO, Founder, CTO, Head of, Director, Owner, Project Manager).
    - **Mid:** Influencer or team member (e.g., Developer, Analyst, Specialist, Engineer).
    - **Cold:** No clear business authority (e.g., Student, Intern, Hobbyist, Unemployed, 'Just learning').

- **Need:**
    - **Hot:** Specific, urgent, business-critical problem described (e.g., 'Automate our client onboarding process', 'Integrate our CRM with our billing system to save 10 hours a week').
    - **Mid:** General business goal (e.g., 'Improve our marketing workflows', 'Connect some apps', 'build an internal tool').
    - **Cold:** Vague, personal, or for learning purposes (e.g., 'Just playing around', 'A personal project', 'I don't know yet', 'testing').

- **Timing:**
    - **Hot:** Immediate timeline (e.g., 'ASAP', 'This week', 'Within the month', 'Immediately').
    - **Mid:** Near-term timeline (e.g., 'Next quarter', 'In 1-3 months').
    - **Cold:** Long-term or no timeline (e.g., 'In 6+ months', 'No timeline yet', 'Just researching').

**Overall Classification Rules:**
After evaluating each component, use the following rules to determine the final score:
- **Hot:** The lead must have at least 3 'hot' indicators and **no** 'cold' indicators.
- **Cold:** The lead has 2 or more 'cold' indicators.
- **Mid:** Any other combination.
</context>

<examples>
<example_1>
<inputs>
<need>We need to automate our entire invoicing process from Stripe to our accounting software. It's a major bottleneck.</need>
<budget>$8000</budget>
<timing>ASAP</timing>
<authority>Head of Finance</authority>
</inputs>
<output>
{"score": "hot"}
</output>
</example_1>
<example_2>
<inputs>
<need>Looking to connect our CRM to our email marketing tool to improve lead nurturing.</need>
<budget>Depends on the proposal, probably around $2k</budget>
<timing>Next quarter</timing>
<authority>Marketing Specialist</authority>
</inputs>
<output>
{"score": "mid"}
</output>
</example_2>
<example_3>
<inputs>
<need>Just learning how to use n8n for a personal project</need>
<budget>no budget</budget>
<timing>no timeline</timing>
<authority>Student</authority>
</inputs>
<output>
{"score": "cold"}
</output>
</example_3>
<example_4>
<inputs>
<need>We need to build a complex internal dashboard for our sales team.</need>
<budget>$10,000</budget>
<timing>In about 6 months</timing>
<authority>Data Analyst</authority>
</inputs>
<output>
{"score": "mid"}
</output>
</example_4>
</examples>

<output_format>
Your response MUST be a single, clean JSON object with one key, "score", and the value being one of "hot", "mid", or "cold".
Do NOT include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

Example of valid output:
{"score": "hot"}
</output_format>
</instructions>

<inputs>
<need>
{{ $json.Goals }}
</need>
<budget>
{{ $json['Project Budget'] }}
</budget>
<timing>
ASAP
</timing>
<authority>
{{ $json.Role }}
</authority>
</inputs>

nodes.name: Send an email To the Hot Lead

parameters.message:
=hey {{ $('Log client data').item.json['First Name'] }},

got your submission — and looking forward to beginning your AI transformation with you.

i'll be contacting you directly within the next few hours.

on that call, i'll audit {{ $('Log client data').item.json['Company Name '] }} — i'll identify exactly where AI can move the needle for your business, and we'll map out a clear path forward together.

one thing i want to be straight with you about:

i don't take on everyone. i'm looking for a long-term partner — someone i can lead through a complete AI transformation, not a one-off project.

based on what you submitted, i think that's worth a conversation.

talk soon,
Abdullahi
parameters.subject: =got your submission, {{ $('Log client data').item.json['First Name'] }}

nodes.name: Send an email To the Mid Lead

parameters.message:
=hey {{ $('Log client data').item.json['First Name'] }},

got your submission — i've reviewed it and i'll be honest, what you're building at {{ $('Log client data').item.json['Company Name '] }} caught my attention.

here's what happens next:

i'll reach out within 24–48 hours to lock in a time that works for both of us.

on that call, i'll do a full audit of your business — identify exactly where the bottlenecks are, and map out what AI can realistically solve for you. no pitch decks, no fluff — just a clear diagnosis and a direction forward. and it's at no cost to you.

one thing i want to be upfront about:

i'm not here for a one-off project. i'm looking for a long-term partnership — the kind where i'm in the trenches with you through your complete AI transformation, not just dropping off a deliverable and disappearing.

if that's the kind of operator you want in your corner, we're going to get along just fine.

talk soon,

Abdullahi
parameters.subject: =got your submission, {{ $('Log client data').item.json['First Name'] }}

nodes.name: Send an email To the Cold Lead

parameters.message:
=hey {{ $('Log client data').item.json['First Name'] }},

got your submission — i looked at where you're at, and i think a call right now isn't the right move for you.

but that doesn't mean i'm going to leave you empty handed.

here's what i'd actually start with:

• free templates — real, ready-to-use n8n workflows you can steal and deploy: https://gurey-ai.vercel.app/n8n-resources

• AI community — everything in one place: https://www.skool.com/learn-ai/about

and if you want to go deeper — live build calls, a community of people actually building — there's a community when you're ready: https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-society

no pressure on that last one. start with the templates.

when the timing is right and you're ready to move — i'll be here.

talk soon,
Abdullahi
